Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. A retro terminal music player inspired by Winamp 26 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. IRIX 3dfx Voodoo driver and glide2x IRIX port 20 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. An unsolicited guide to being a researcher [pdf] 161 upvotes, 21 comments
  4. Chat GPT 5.2 cannot explain the German word "geschniegelt" 49 upvotes, 7 comments
  5. Ju Ci: The Art of Repairing Porcelain 39 upvotes, 5 comments
  6. Autoresearch on an old research idea 251 upvotes, 65 comments
  7. BIO: The Bao I/O Coprocessor 115 upvotes, 26 comments
  8. Finding all regex matches has always been O(n²) 145 upvotes, 36 comments
  9. Claude Code Cheat Sheet 97 upvotes, 25 comments
  10. Dune3d: A parametric 3D CAD application 90 upvotes, 24 comments
  11. Windows 3.1 tiled background .bmp archive 80 upvotes, 21 comments
  12. Trivy under attack again: Widespread GitHub Actions tag compromise secrets 148 upvotes, 54 comments
  13. Bombadil: Property-based testing for web UIs 221 upvotes, 87 comments
  14. An incoherent Rust 103 upvotes, 37 comments
  15. iPhone 17 Pro Demonstrated Running a 400B LLM 460 upvotes, 234 comments
  16. Local Stack Archived their GitHub repo and requires an account to run 147 upvotes, 69 comments
  17. “Collaboration” is bullshit 290 upvotes, 158 comments
  18. Digs: iOS app that syncs your Discogs collection and lets you browse it offline 45 upvotes, 18 comments
  19. FCC Updates Covered List to Include Foreign-Made Consumer Routers 128 upvotes, 68 comments
  20. US and TotalEnergies reach 'nearly $1B' deal to end offshore wind projects 311 upvotes, 218 comments
  21. Show HN: Cq – Stack Overflow for AI coding agents 36 upvotes, 17 comments
  22. Migrating to the EU 818 upvotes, 630 comments
  23. Pentagon Adopts New Limits for Journalists After Court Loss 21 upvotes, 9 comments
  24. Designing AI for Disruptive Science 54 upvotes, 35 comments
  25. How I'm Productive with Claude Code 98 upvotes, 73 comments
  26. I built an AI receptionist for a mechanic shop 201 upvotes, 225 comments
  27. America tells private firms to “hack back” 100 upvotes, 113 comments
  28. No, Windows Start does not use React 23 upvotes, 19 comments
  29. Hacker mints $80M USD worth of USR stablecoins 55 upvotes, 60 comments
  30. Two pilots dead after plane and ground vehicle collide at LaGuardia 321 upvotes, 511 comments

Last generated 8:30am, 24 March 2026. Source here.
